cases.name: BED-6695 negated incoming pattern predicate with contains filter remains row-correlated
cases.cypher: match (g:NodeKind1) where g.name contains 'BED-6695 KEY ADMINS' and not ((g)<-[:EdgeKind1]-(:NodeKind2)) return count(g)

cases.name: BED-6695 flipped equivalent pattern predicate returns the same count
cases.cypher: match (g:NodeKind1) where g.name contains 'BED-6695 KEY ADMINS' and not ((:NodeKind2)-[:EdgeKind1]->(g)) return count(g)

cases.name: BED-6695 positive incoming pattern predicate with contains filter remains row-correlated
cases.cypher: match (g:NodeKind1) where g.name contains 'BED-6695 KEY ADMINS' and (g)<-[:EdgeKind1]-(:NodeKind2) return count(g)

cases.name: BED-6695 negated incoming pattern predicate without property filter remains row-correlated
BED-6695 incoming negated pattern without outer selectivity (left-directed form)
BED-6695 incoming negated pattern without outer selectivity (right-directed equivalent)
BED-6695 connected key admins group should be excluded by negated incoming pattern (left-directed)
cases.cypher: match (g:NodeKind2) where g.name = 'KEY ADMINS BETA' and not ((g)<-[:EdgeKind1]-(:NodeKind1)) return g

cases.name: BED-6695 connected key admins group should be excluded by negated incoming pattern (right-directed equivalent)
cases.cypher: match (g:NodeKind2) where g.name = 'KEY ADMINS BETA' and not ((:NodeKind1)-[:EdgeKind1]->(g)) return g

cases.name: BED-6695 directed both-bound pattern predicate accepts connected pair
cases.cypher: match (a:NodeKind1), (b:NodeKind2) where a.name = 'User A' and b.name = 'KEY ADMINS BETA' and (a)-[:EdgeKind1]->(b) return count(a)

cases.name: BED-6695 directed both-bound pattern predicate rejects disconnected pair
cases.cypher: match (a:NodeKind1), (b:NodeKind2) where a.name = 'User A' and b.name = 'KEY ADMINS GAMMA' and (a)-[:EdgeKind1]->(b) return count(a)

cases.name: BED-6695 directed both-bound pattern predicate rejects wrong edge kind
cases.cypher: match (a:NodeKind1), (b:NodeKind2) where a.name = 'User A' and b.name = 'KEY ADMINS ALPHA' and (a)-[:EdgeKind1]->(b) return count(a)

cases.name: BED-6695 directed both-bound pattern predicate rejects reversed pair
cases.cypher: match (a:NodeKind1), (b:NodeKind2) where a.name = 'User A' and b.name = 'KEY ADMINS BETA' and (b)-[:EdgeKind1]->(a) return count(a)
